name: API Scraper (ScrapFly)
description: Paid API fallback for pages that failed both page-scraper and browser-scraper. Uses ScrapFly's Anti-Scraping Protection to bypass Cloudflare, Turnstile, and aggressive bot detection. Only processes pages with status 'error' or word_count below threshold — never wastes credits on already-scraped pages.
usage_notes: Run after browser-scraper. Only re-scrapes pages that failed all previous scrapers. Requires SCRAPFLY_KEY environment variable. Each request costs ~30 ScrapFly credits (ASP + JS rendering). Monitor credit usage in ScrapFly dashboard.

options.name: min_word_threshold
options.label: Re-scrape threshold (words)
options.description: Only re-scrape pages with word_count below this value. Pages above are passed through unchanged.

options.name: max_content_length
options.label: Max extracted text (chars)
options.description: Truncate extracted text to this many characters.

options.name: concurrency
options.label: Concurrent API requests
options.description: Number of simultaneous ScrapFly requests. Keep low to avoid rate limits and credit burn.

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: API timeout (ms)
options.description: Timeout for each ScrapFly API request. Cloudflare bypass can take 10-20 seconds.

options.name: country
options.label: Geo-location country
options.description: Optional country code for geo-located requests (e.g. 'GB', 'US', 'MT'). Leave empty to let ScrapFly auto-select. Only set if a site geo-restricts content.
